---
title: "Info-graphics Demo" 
description: "Last User: `r stringr::str_sub(getwd(), 10, stringr::str_locate(stringr::str_sub(getwd(), 10, -1), '/')[1]+10-2)`"
date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss"
published-title: Last Modified
doi: "`r Sys.time()`"
doi-title: Last Ran
execute:
  echo: false
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    fontsize: 0.9em
    fig-width: 12
    fig-height: 7
editor: source
self-contained: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---


<style>

.txt_h {
  text-align: center;
}


</style>

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false  

library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

#https://stackoverflow.com/questions/66974669/collapse-rows-is-not-collapsed-and-updating-packages-does-not-fix
#devtools::install_github(repo="haozhu233/kableExtra", ref="a6af5c0") #to get collapse rows to work 

box::use(
    box/admin
  , box/infograph
)
```


```{r}
REV_APS <- readRDS(file.path(admin$sp_data, "NCRP_REV_APS.RDS"))
REV_SC <- readRDS(file.path(admin$sp_data, "NCRP_REV_SC.RDS"))

humansvg <- csgjcr::csg_sp_path('50 State Revocations Project/MCLC Shiny App/background/infographics/icons/noun-person-2745706-edit-Page-2.drawio.svg')
```


```{r}
#| eval: false 
#| message: false 

IG_DF <- REV_APS$R %>% 
  filter(RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[2:3]) %>% #only look at White, Black, Hispanic
  filter(RPTYEAR == RECENT_YR) %>%  #most recent year
  filter(!is.na(RRI), RRI != Inf) %>% #remove if RRI is NA or RRI = Inf (devided by 0
  group_by(STATE) %>% #figure out if able to create infograh -- need at least 2 groups 
  mutate(n_groups = sum(!is.na(RACE))) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  filter(n_groups > 1) %>% 
  filter(ABB == "CA") #remove dc 

pwalk(
  list(
      rri_raw = IG_DF$RRI
    , race = IG_DF$RACE
    , label   = paste0("BJS_", IG_DF$STATE, "_", IG_DF$RACE)
    , savefile= TRUE
    , infogs  = 10
  )
  , infograph$create_infograph 
)

rm(IG_DF)
```

```{r}
#| eval: false 
#| message: false 

IG_DF <- REV_SC$R %>% 
  filter(RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[2:3]) %>% #only look at White, Black, Hispanic
  filter(RPTYEAR == RECENT_YR) %>%  #most recent year
  filter(!is.na(RRI), RRI != Inf) %>% #remove if RRI is NA or RRI = Inf (devided by 0
  group_by(STATE) %>% #figure out if able to create infograh -- need at least 2 groups 
  mutate(n_groups = sum(!is.na(RACE))) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  filter(n_groups > 1) %>% 
  filter(ABB == "CA") #remove dc 

pwalk(
  list(
      rri_raw = IG_DF$RRI
    , race = IG_DF$RACE
    , label   = paste0("SC_", IG_DF$STATE, "_", IG_DF$RACE)
    , savefile= TRUE
    , infogs  = 10
  )
  , infograph$create_infograph 
)

rm(IG_DF)
```


- single year RRI infographic for just any offense category 
- BJS data is not available for all years 
  * states have missing years (i.e. CA is missing 2016 and 2018)
  * data broken out by race and states is only available up to 2018 (there is data for 2019 and 2020, but that data is NOT available by state and race) 

# Racial and Ethnic Disparities 

<!-- start {.panel-tabset} --> 
::: {.panel-tabset} 

## Disparities in parole revocations {.txt_h}



### For every <img src="`r humansvg`" style="height: 1em;"> White client that is revoked ... 

<br>

![](`r file.path(admin$sp_data, 'infographs/BJS_California_Black.png')`){fig-align="center" width="500px"}

![](`r file.path(admin$sp_data, 'infographs/BJS_California_Hispanic.png')`){fig-align="center" width="500px"}



### Tables

#### Relative Rate Index (White Reference Group)



```{r}

bind_rows(
  REV_APS$R %>% 
    filter(RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[2:3]) %>% 
    filter(ABB == "CA") %>% 
    mutate(OFFGENERAL = "All Categories") %>% 
    select(`Offense Category` = OFFGENERAL, `Race` = RACE, RPTYEAR, RRI) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = RPTYEAR, values_from = RRI)
  , 
  REV_APS$OR %>% 
    filter(OFFGENERAL %in% admin$lev_OFFGENERAL[1:4], RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[2:3]) %>% 
    filter(ABB == "CA") %>% 
    select(`Offense Category` = OFFGENERAL, `Race` = RACE, RPTYEAR, RRI) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = RPTYEAR, values_from = RRI)
) %>% 
  mutate_if(is.numeric, ~ifelse(is.na(.), NA, sprintf("%.1f", .))) %>% 
  kable(align = "llrrrrr", format = "html", table.attr = "style='width:800px;'") %>% 
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed")) %>% 
  collapse_rows(columns = 1, valign = "top") %>% 
  row_spec(1:2, bold = TRUE)
```


#### Revocation Rate per 100,000 People in Parole Population for a given Race/Ethnicity Group

```{r}
bind_rows(
  REV_APS$R %>% 
    filter(RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[1:3]) %>% 
    filter(ABB == "CA") %>% 
    mutate(OFFGENERAL = "All Categories") %>% 
    select(`Offense Category` = OFFGENERAL, `Race` = RACE, RPTYEAR, RATE_100K) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = RPTYEAR, values_from = RATE_100K)
  , 
  REV_APS$OR %>% 
    filter(OFFGENERAL %in% admin$lev_OFFGENERAL[1:4], RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[1:3]) %>% 
    filter(ABB == "CA") %>% 
    select(`Offense Category` = OFFGENERAL, `Race` = RACE, RPTYEAR, RATE_100K) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = RPTYEAR, values_from = RATE_100K)
) %>% 
  mutate_if(is.numeric, ~ifelse(is.na(.), NA, scales::comma(., accuracy = 0.1))) %>% 
  kable(align = "llrrrrr", format = "html", table.attr = "style='width:800px;'") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed")) %>% 
  collapse_rows(columns = 1, valign = "top") %>% 
  row_spec(1:3, bold = TRUE)
```


#### Revocations Counts 

```{r}
bind_rows(
  REV_APS$R %>% 
    filter(RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[1:3]) %>% 
    filter(ABB == "CA") %>% 
    mutate(OFFGENERAL = "All Categories") %>% 
    select(`Offense Category` = OFFGENERAL, `Race` = RACE, RPTYEAR, REVCNT) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = RPTYEAR, values_from = REVCNT)
  , 
  REV_APS$OR %>% 
    filter(OFFGENERAL %in% admin$lev_OFFGENERAL[1:4], RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[1:3]) %>% 
    filter(ABB == "CA") %>% 
    select(`Offense Category` = OFFGENERAL, `Race` = RACE, RPTYEAR, REVCNT) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = RPTYEAR, values_from = REVCNT)
) %>% 
  mutate_if(is.numeric, ~ifelse(is.na(.), NA, scales::comma(., accuracy = 1))) %>% 
  kable(align = "llrrrrr", format = "html", table.attr = "style='width:800px;'") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed")) %>% 
  collapse_rows(columns = 1, valign = "top") %>% 
  row_spec(1:3, bold = TRUE)
```

## Cumulative disparities across the criminal justice system {.txt_h}



### For every <img src="`r humansvg`" style="height: 1em;"> White client that is revoked ... 
<br>

![](`r file.path(admin$sp_data, 'infographs/SC_California_Black.png')`){fig-align="center" width="500px"}

![](`r file.path(admin$sp_data, 'infographs/SC_California_Hispanic.png')`){fig-align="center" width="500px"}




### Tables


#### Relative Rate Index (White Reference Group)

```{r}

bind_rows(
  REV_SC$R %>% 
    filter(RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[2:3]) %>% 
    filter(ABB == "CA") %>% 
    mutate(OFFGENERAL = "All Categories") %>% 
    select(`Offense Category` = OFFGENERAL, `Race` = RACE, RPTYEAR, RRI) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = RPTYEAR, values_from = RRI)
  , 
  REV_SC$OR %>% 
    filter(OFFGENERAL %in% admin$lev_OFFGENERAL[1:4], RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[2:3]) %>% 
    filter(ABB == "CA") %>% 
    select(`Offense Category` = OFFGENERAL, `Race` = RACE, RPTYEAR, RRI) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = RPTYEAR, values_from = RRI)
) %>% 
  mutate_if(is.numeric, ~ifelse(is.na(.), NA, sprintf("%.1fx", .))) %>% 
  kable(align = "llrrrrr", format = "html", table.attr = "style='width:800px;'") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed")) %>% 
  collapse_rows(columns = 1, valign = "top") %>% 
  row_spec(1:2, bold = TRUE)
```


#### Revocation Rate per 100,000 People in State Population for a given Race/Ethnicity Group

```{r}
bind_rows(
  REV_SC$R %>% 
    filter(RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[1:3]) %>% 
    filter(ABB == "CA") %>% 
    mutate(OFFGENERAL = "All Categories") %>% 
    select(`Offense Category` = OFFGENERAL, `Race` = RACE, RPTYEAR, RATE_100K) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = RPTYEAR, values_from = RATE_100K)
  , 
  REV_SC$OR %>% 
    filter(OFFGENERAL %in% admin$lev_OFFGENERAL[1:4], RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[1:3]) %>% 
    filter(ABB == "CA") %>% 
    select(`Offense Category` = OFFGENERAL, `Race` = RACE, RPTYEAR, RATE_100K) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = RPTYEAR, values_from = RATE_100K)
) %>% 
  mutate_if(is.numeric, ~ifelse(is.na(.), NA, scales::comma(., accuracy = 0.1))) %>% 
  kable(align = "llrrrrr", format = "html", table.attr = "style='width:800px;'") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed")) %>% 
  collapse_rows(columns = 1, valign = "top") %>% 
  row_spec(1:3, bold = TRUE)
```


#### Revocations Counts 

```{r}
bind_rows(
  REV_SC$R %>% 
    filter(RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[1:3]) %>% 
    filter(ABB == "CA") %>% 
    mutate(OFFGENERAL = "All Categories") %>% 
    select(`Offense Category` = OFFGENERAL, `Race` = RACE, RPTYEAR, REVCNT) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = RPTYEAR, values_from = REVCNT)
  , 
  REV_SC$OR %>% 
    filter(OFFGENERAL %in% admin$lev_OFFGENERAL[1:4], RACE %in% admin$lev_RACE[1:3]) %>% 
    filter(ABB == "CA") %>% 
    select(`Offense Category` = OFFGENERAL, `Race` = RACE, RPTYEAR, REVCNT) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = RPTYEAR, values_from = REVCNT)
) %>% 
  mutate_if(is.numeric, ~ifelse(is.na(.), NA, scales::comma(., accuracy = 1))) %>% 
  kable(align = "llrrrrr", format = "html", table.attr = "style='width:800px;'") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed")) %>% 
  collapse_rows(columns = 1, valign = "top") %>% 
  row_spec(1:3, bold = TRUE)
```

:::
<!-- end {.panel-tabset} -->
